since_last: 62% of 86 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +1.11%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 62% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.44% · BTC -0.66% · Gold -1.54% · Nasdaq100 -3.29%. 62% of 86 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +1.11%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +1.11%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.40%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ARM is the standout at +3.04%
cards.body: Leaders: ARM +3.04%, MU +2.82%, AMBA +1.97%, LSCC +1.81%, PWR +1.74%. Laggards: SAP -2.08%, BABA -1.46%, NOW -1.26%, OKTA -1.00%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.05% at $156.03
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
